metadata.title: Love in the Margin
metadata.logline: When a reclusive top student and the school's star basketball player are paired for a mandatory history project, they discover that life's most important lessons aren't found in textbooks or on the court.
metadata.author: AI

scenes.title: The Weight of the Grade
scenes.summary: Mr. Han stands at the front of the classroom, his glasses reflecting the harsh fluorescent lights as he slams a heavy textbook onto the podium. He announces the 'Local Heritage Project,' a high-stakes history assignment that will account for 40% of the students' final grade. Seo-yoon, a top student, immediately begins highlighting her notes, her anxiety rising as she mentally prepares for a solo victory, only for Mr. Han to crush her hopes by announcing that the project will be done in randomized pairs.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in Classroom 2-B is thick with the scent of floor wax and the collective anxiety of thirty students.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and immersive. A low, cinematic whisper that sets a high-stakes tone.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: [SLAM] Pay attention!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Thunderous Authority': A sharp, explosive volume that commands immediate silence and triggers a flinch response.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clutching the wooden pointer tightly at his side, face contorted in suppressed anger

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Ugh... my heart literally just stopped. Does he have to be so dramatic first thing in the morning?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Drained Complaint': A breathless, quiet whine that sounds like the speaker has already given up on the day.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely exhausted, slumped shoulders, blank expression with 'soul leaving body' effect

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: This semester’s centerpiece is the 'Local Heritage Project.' It is a comprehensive historical analysis that will account for 40% of your final grade.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Cold Lecturer': Monotone, precise, and devoid of empathy, emphasizing the weight of the percentage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting wire-rimmed glasses with one finger, looking downward intensely

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (40%... That’s the difference between a perfect GPA and second place. I can’t afford even a single mistake.)
main_dialogue.tone: Internal thought. Rapid-fire, high-pitched inner monologue reflecting extreme focus and rising panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Scribbling of a highlighter on paper

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Yawn] 40%? Sounds like a lot of work for a history trip.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Arrogant Drawl': Lazy, slow, and purposefully disrespectful. Each word is stretched to show lack of interest.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Before you begin your solo outlines... there is a change in the curriculum this year.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Calculating Reveal': Slowing down the pace to build tension, with a slight edge of sadistic glee.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (A change? No, no, no... please just let it be a normal essay.)
main_dialogue.tone: Nervous and frantic. The voice is shaky, mirroring her tightening grip on her pen.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: To encourage 'collaboration,' this project will be completed in randomized pairs. No exceptions.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Final Verdict': Firm and immovable, delivered like a judge passing a sentence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing the wooden pointer forward authoritatively, mouth open as if lecturing

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Randomized?! But sir—!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Panic Spike': High-pitched and sharp, the sound of a carefully built world crumbling down.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Sir, this project is too important to leave to chance! My grade shouldn't depend on someone else's effort!
branching_dialogue.tone: Defiant and desperate. The voice cracks slightly under the weight of her anxiety.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: Sit down, Min Seo-yoon. In the real world, you don't choose your colleagues.
branching_dialogue.tone: Cold and dismissive. A verbal shut-down that leaves no room for argument.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking over the top of his glasses, one eyebrow raised in suspicion

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Accept it silently and pray for a good partner.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [Exhale] Please... just let it be Hana. Or anyone who knows how to open a textbook.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Desperate Prayer': Soft, breathless, and heavy with dread.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
branching_dialogue.text: Don't look at me like that, Seo-yoon! I'll try my best if we're together! Probably!
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and slightly defensive. A cheerful, bouncy melody to her voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting with puffed-out cheeks, arms crossed, looking slightly to the side

content.initial_location_description: A crisp, modern high school classroom in a sharp manhwa style. The sunlight filters through large windows, but the mood is dominated by the harsh, cold glow of overhead fluorescent lights. Rows of wooden desks are filled with students in neat uniforms. At the front, a wide green chalkboard is wiped clean, and a sturdy wooden podium stands central.
content.initial_bgm: tense academic atmosphere with low rhythmic ticking

scenes.title: The Unlucky Pairing
scenes.summary: The room is filled with murmurs as Mr. Han reads the list of partners. Seo-yoon's heart sinks when her name is paired with Kang Ji-ho. She turns to see Ji-ho in the back of the room, leaning back in his chair and spinning a basketball on his finger, looking completely unbothered by the academic catastrophe that just befell her. Their eyes meet briefly—Seo-yoon’s glare is sharp and judgmental, while Ji-ho offers a lazy, playful smirk that only irritates her more.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: [Tapping the board] Quiet down, everyone. I have the finalized list for the History Term Project partners.
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and dry. The sound of a teacher who has done this a thousand times and just wants to finish the period.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding wooden pointer, tapping it against open palm, stern disciplinary look
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: rhythmic wooden tapping on a chalkboard

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: [Whispering] Please let us be together, Seo-yoon! If I get paired with one of the guys from the soccer team, my GPA is toast.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Conspiratorial Whisper': leaning in close, voice low but high-pitched with anxiety and excitement.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Whispering a secret, one hand cupped near her mouth, leaning in with a conspiratorial glint in her eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Don't worry, Hana. We usually end up in the same bracket. Just... stay positive.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and steady, though there is a hint of underlying nervousness in her breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Moving on. Park Min-ji and Lee Hana...
main_dialogue.tone: Flat and monotonous.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting wire-rimmed glasses with one finger, looking downward intensely

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Nooo! My GPA!
main_dialogue.tone: Exaggerated despair, mock-crying.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely exhausted, slumped shoulders, blank expression with 'soul leaving body' effect

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: And finally... Min Seo-yoon. You will be working with... Kang Ji-ho.
main_dialogue.tone: Final and absolute. He closes the book with a definitive snap.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, holding attendance book against chest, neutral expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The world seems to stop for a moment. The air in the classroom grows heavy as the name 'Kang Ji-ho' echoes against the walls.
main_dialogue.tone: Dramatic and heavy narration.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Wait... [Stuttering] Mr. Han? Did you say... Ji-ho? As in, the guy who hasn't opened a textbook since the orientation?
main_dialogue.tone: Pure shock, voice cracking slightly with disbelief and rising panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: The list is final, Seo-yoon. Perhaps your 'studious influence' will do him some good. Now, everyone, get to your partners.
main_dialogue.tone: Dismissive and tired, already moving toward his desk to sit down.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sighing with eyes closed, hand rubbing the bridge of his nose, looking tired and overworked

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon turns slowly, her neck feeling stiff. In the very last row, leaned back against the window, sits the source of her upcoming academic nightmare.
main_dialogue.tone: Tense and cinematic narration.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Looks like you're stuck with me, Class President. Try not to make it too boring, okay?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Lazy Drawl': slow, melodic, and deeply irritating. Every word drips with casual confidence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Thinking] This is a disaster. A complete, unmitigated disaster. I can't let him ruin my perfect record.
main_dialogue.tone: Internal monologue: Sharp, frantic, and judgmental.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Listen, Ji-ho. If we're doing this, you're following my schedule. No basketball, no excuses, and no being late!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and bossy, attempting to take control of the situation.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa, scary. You always this intense, or is it just for me?
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and mocking, completely unfazed by her outburst.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask Mr. Han to change partners.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Sir, I really think I would be more productive with someone else. Our... learning styles are quite different.
branching_dialogue.tone: Polite but desperate, pleading with her eyes.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: Different is good, Seo-yoon. It builds character. My decision stands.
branching_dialogue.tone: Firm and final.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: [Laughing] Ouch. Rejected by the teacher. Don't worry, I won't bite.
branching_dialogue.tone: Hearty and amused.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing heartily with eyes closed.

content.initial_location_description: A vibrant, sun-drenched high school classroom in a clean manhwa art style. Large windows show a clear blue sky. The chalkboard is filled with notes about the 'History Term Project', and students are buzzing with nervous energy in their wooden desks.
content.initial_bgm: upbeat school atmosphere with a hint of tension

scenes.title: Oil and Water
scenes.summary: Ji-ho drags his chair over to Seo-yoon’s desk, the screech of the metal legs echoing her internal frustration. Seo-yoon immediately pulls out a meticulous project schedule, but Ji-ho dismisses it, jokingly suggesting they just 'wing it' or find a short YouTube video to summarize. The tension escalates as Seo-yoon calls him an 'academically indifferent jock' and Ji-ho counters by calling her a 'stiff, boring bookworm' who needs to learn how to breathe.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The peace of the afternoon is shattered by a sound akin to a dying banshee.
main_dialogue.tone: Narrative and slightly dramatic.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: loud metal screech of a chair on tile

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Do you absolutely have to announce your arrival with enough decibels to wake the dead?
main_dialogue.tone: Sharp and clinical. Every word is articulated with precise irritation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: It’s called an 'entrance,' Seo-yoon. You should try it sometime instead of blending into the furniture.
main_dialogue.tone: Playful and smug. A low, vibrating confidence that suggests he's enjoying her reaction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I’ve prepared the roadmap. This is a twenty-step project schedule, segmented by research, drafting, and cross-referencing. We start on step one... now.
main_dialogue.tone: Focused and authoritative. The 'Teacher's Pet' tone—high-pitched, fast-paced, and utterly serious.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] A schedule? For a history project? Look at all those colors... it’s giving me a headache just looking at it.
main_dialogue.tone: Dismissive and lazy. The words are dragged out as if talking is a physical chore.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Why don't we just wing it? I’ll find a five-minute YouTube summary on the bus, we’ll throw some slides together, and boom—C-plus. Easy life.
main_dialogue.tone: Casual and persuasive. Breezy, lighthearted, and completely lacking in academic ambition.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: A 'C-plus'? My GPA is not a playground for your laziness, you academically indifferent jock!
main_dialogue.tone: High-strung and indignant. The 'Righteous Fury' tone—sharp, piercing, and trembling with disbelief.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: And my life isn't a library, you stiff, boring bookworm! Seriously, do you ever stop to breathe, or does the oxygen interfere with your memorization?
main_dialogue.tone: Reactive and mocking. Sharp, defensive, but with an underlying edge of genuine exasperation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Annoyed, rolling eyes while clicking his tongue, hand on hip, looking away.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Oxygen is for people who have the brain capacity to use it. Now, open your notebook to page forty-two.
branching_dialogue.tone: Icy and uncompromising. A cold, flat delivery designed to shut down further debate.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Fine, fine. I'm opening it. Just stop looking at me like I'm a specimen in a lab.
branching_dialogue.tone: Defeated but grumbling. Muffled and low, like a scolded puppy.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [sigh] If we use the video for the introduction... will you at least promise to read the primary sources for the conclusion?
branching_dialogue.tone: Yielding but cautious. Softened edges, but still maintaining a shred of her standards.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: See? That wasn't so hard. Compromise! Look at us, actually communicating like normal humans.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile'. Bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting. You can hear the grin in his voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

content.initial_location_description: A tidy corner of a high school classroom in a vibrant manhwa style. Seo-yoon's desk is impeccably organized with color-coded highlighters and a thick textbook. Warm afternoon light filters through the window, catching dust motes in the air. Other desks are blurred in the background.
content.initial_bgm: quirky and slightly stressful acoustic guitar

scenes.title: The Research Avalanche
scenes.summary: In an attempt to prove how much work is required, Seo-yoon pulls out a literal mountain of research books from her bag. As Ji-ho reaches for his phone, his oversized athletic jacket catches the corner of the stack. In a slow-motion manhwa-style disaster, the books tumble across the floor with a series of loud thuds. The entire class goes silent, watching as the duo erupts into a public bickering match, with Seo-yoon accusing Ji-ho of being a walking disaster area.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how much work this project actually entails, Ji-ho? It's not just 'googling a few facts' and calling it a day.
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and lecture-like; the voice of a student council president reaching her limit.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Relax, Seo-yoon. You worry enough for the both of us. It’s a presentation, not a thesis for the Ministry of Education.
main_dialogue.tone: Teasing and breezy, completely unfazed by her intensity.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Oh, is that so? Then maybe you should see the 'light reading' I've prepared for our first draft!
main_dialogue.tone: Challenging; she's about to make a point and she knows she's right.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: With a flourish that could only be described as 'theatrical overachiever,' Seo-yoon begins hauling massive, leather-bound research volumes out of her bag. One, two... five... eight... they pile up into a precarious tower on the edge of the shared desk.
main_dialogue.tone: Observational and slightly comedic.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Whoa! Are you trying to build a fortress or a bibliography? Wait, I think I just got a text...
main_dialogue.tone: Stunned and slightly mocking, but quickly distracted.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho shifts his weight to reach into his pocket. His oversized varsity jacket—loose and unzipped—flares out like a cape.
main_dialogue.tone: Descriptive of a looming disaster.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho, watch your sleeve—! [gasp]
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and panicked.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: It happens in slow motion. The corner of his sleeve catches the spine of the topmost book. The entire 'Research Mountain' tilts, wavers, and then succumbs to gravity.
main_dialogue.tone: Dramatic manhwa-style narration.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: What in the world is that racket?!
main_dialogue.tone: Startled and authoritative, breaking the sudden silence of the class.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shocked expression, eyes wide behind glasses, grip loosening on the wooden pointer.

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Omo! Seo-yoon, are you okay? It looks like a library exploded over there!
main_dialogue.tone: Shocked and slightly amused, looking over from her desk.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deeply surprised, both hands on her cheeks, mouth in an 'O' shape.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: KANG JI-HO! You literal walking disaster area! Do you have any coordination at all?!
main_dialogue.tone: Explosive and furious; her face is turning as red as a beet.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Me?! You're the one who brought an entire wing of the national library to school! It's a safety hazard!
main_dialogue.tone: Defensive and loud, matching her energy to hide his embarrassment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive stance, gritting teeth, sharp glare, fists clenched at his sides.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Safety hazard? My research is the only thing keeping this team's grades alive, you... you varsity-jacketed menace!
branching_dialogue.tone: Escalating frustration, her hands are shaking with anger.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: That is enough! Both of you, pick up those books and see me after class. My ears are ringing!
branching_dialogue.tone: Strict and exhausted.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sighing with eyes closed, hand rubbing the bridge of his nose, looking tired and overworked.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [Deep breath] I... I can't even deal with you right now. Just... just help me pick them up before Mr. Han gives us a demerit.
branching_dialogue.tone: Controlled but icy, trying to regain her composure.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Fine. My bad, okay? I'll grab the heavy ones. You don't have to look like you're about to cry.
branching_dialogue.tone: Softening slightly, looking away to hide his guilt.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

content.initial_location_description: A vibrant manhwa-style classroom with large windows letting in golden afternoon light. Desks are arranged in neat rows, and a chalkboard in the front is covered in complex literature notes. The atmosphere is thick with the post-lunch lethargy of high school students.
content.initial_bgm: upbeat academic tension with light woodwinds

scenes.title: The Ultimatum
scenes.summary: The argument is silenced by the shadow of Mr. Han looming over them. Looking unimpressed by their lack of cooperation, Mr. Han delivers a final blow: if they don't produce a viable draft of their project proposal by tomorrow morning, they will both be assigned two weeks of after-school detention and receive an automatic failing grade for the first milestone. Left with no choice, Seo-yoon and Ji-ho exchange a look of mutual dread, realizing they are forced to work together through the night.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I told you already, Seo-yoon! If we just go with my summary, we’ll be done in ten minutes. Why do you have to be so... so difficult?
main_dialogue.tone: Staccato and sharp: Every word is punctuated with frustration, his voice rising in pitch as he tries to assert dominance.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Annoyed, rolling eyes while clicking his tongue, hand on hip, looking away.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Efficiency doesn't matter if the logic is fundamentally flawed! Your summary is barely three sentences long. That’s not a proposal, it’s a... it’s a tweet!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Defensive Tremor': Her voice is thin and shaky but filled with an underlying steeliness of academic conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in the room suddenly grows cold. A massive, looming shadow stretches across the floor, swallowing the golden sunlight and stopping the argument in its tracks.
main_dialogue.tone: Low and ominous.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: I was under the impression that this was a classroom, not a debating club for the ill-prepared.
main_dialogue.tone: Ice-Cold Authority: The voice is low, resonant, and devoid of any warmth, making the listener feel small.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking over the top of his glasses, one eyebrow raised in suspicion.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Stammering] Mr. Han! We were just... uh, finalizing the structural integrity of our argument.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Cracked Bravado': High-pitched and frantic, the sound of someone trying—and failing—to sound cool under pressure.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: W-we’re working on it, sir. It's just taking a little more time than we anticipated.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Submissive Whisper': Very quiet, breathy, and fearful of drawing more negative attention.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Time is a luxury you have squandered. I have zero interest in your excuses or your inability to cooperate.
main_dialogue.tone: Measured Disgust: Each word is clipped and precise, like a surgeon making a clean cut.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding wooden pointer, tapping it against open palm, stern disciplinary look.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Listen carefully. If I do not see a viable, comprehensive draft of your proposal on my desk by 8:00 AM tomorrow...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Ultimatum': Deep, slow, and final. This is the point of no return.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing the wooden pointer forward authoritatively, mouth open as if lecturing.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: ...You will both be assigned two weeks of after-school detention and receive an automatic failing grade for this milestone. Am I clear?
main_dialogue.tone: Absolute Zero: The tone is so flat and final it leaves no room for negotiation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: T-two weeks? A failing grade...?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Shattered Glass': Weak and fragile, as if her entire world is crumbling.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Tomorrow morning? Sir, that's impossible! I have basketball training and—
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate Plea: Raspy and urgent, filled with a sense of impending doom.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive stance, gritting teeth, sharp glare, fists clenched at his sides.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Then I suggest you start writing instead of complaining. I expect that draft. Good night.
main_dialogue.tone: Finality: Curt and dismissive.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, holding attendance book against chest, neutral expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Mr. Han leaves, the click of the door echoing like a gavel. The classroom feels smaller now, the shadows longer. Seo-yoon and Ji-ho are left in a heavy silence.
main_dialogue.tone: Somber and heavy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Two weeks of detention... If my dad finds out, I'm literally dead. My spot on the starting lineup is gone.
main_dialogue.tone: Hollow Despair: The arrogance has vanished, replaced by a raw, quiet panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: And my scholarship... I can't have a failing grade on my transcript. I can't.
main_dialogue.tone: Trembling Resolve: She sounds like she's on the verge of tears, but her voice is tightening with a new purpose.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Sigh] I guess we don't have a choice. We’re staying here. All night if we have to.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Grudging Acceptance': Low and raspy, full of reluctant surrender.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: If we're going to survive this night, we need to stop fighting. Let's combine your ideas with my structure.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Olive Branch': Warm but firm, an invitation to cooperate.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Offering the book toward the viewer with both hands, looking hopeful and slightly shy.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Fine. I'll admit, your structure isn't *terrible*. Let's get to work, partner.
branching_dialogue.tone: Softened Pride: A gentle, Crinkled-eye smile is audible in his voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: If you slack off for even one minute, I will make sure the detention is the least of your worries. Put your phone away.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Disciplinarian': Sharp and commanding, sounding like a mini Mr. Han.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa, okay, okay! Scary. I'm putting it away. Let's just... keep our heads on our shoulders, alright?
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Playful Retreat': Light and airy, trying to de-escalate her intensity.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.

content.initial_location_description: A high school classroom in the late afternoon. Long, orange-hued shadows from the setting sun stretch across rows of empty wooden desks. The chalkboard is messy with half-erased equations and diagrams. The air looks dusty and still.
content.initial_bgm: tense ambient with low piano notes

scenes.title: Silence in the Stacks
scenes.summary: Seo-yoon sits at a secluded table, her books organized with military precision. Ji-ho arrives late, looking entirely out of place in the silent atmosphere. He tries to focus, but his leg bounces incessantly, and he keeps spinning his pen like a basketball. The tension between them is thick; Seo-yoon is frustrated by his lack of concentration, while Ji-ho feels suffocated by the dusty air and the weight of the textbooks. Every time Seo-yoon explains a concept, it seems to go over his head, leading to a series of awkward silences and heavy sighs.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The library is a cathedral of silence, preserved in dust and the scent of old paper. Seo-yoon sits in the center of it, her workspace a masterpiece of organization.
main_dialogue.tone: Neutral and descriptive, setting a tranquil mood.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] Three minutes late. He’s already falling behind and we haven't even opened the book.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Studious Perfectionist': Crisp, precise, and layered with a hint of mounting impatience.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The heavy silence is suddenly shattered by the sound of squeaking sneakers and the heavy thud of a designer backpack hitting the floor.
main_dialogue.tone: Abrupt and jarring.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: My bad, my bad. The coach wouldn't let us off the court until I finished my free throws. It’s like he thinks I actually care about my stats.
main_dialogue.tone: Casual and breezy, trying to mask his discomfort with the quiet environment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Your 'stats' won't get you into a university if you fail this midterm. Sit down, Ji-ho. We're on page forty-two.
main_dialogue.tone: Strict and authoritative, like a teacher who has run out of patience.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Forty-two. Right. Got it. [whispering] Man, it’s like a tomb in here. How do you breathe with all this dust?
main_dialogue.tone: Muttered and restless, clearly feeling claustrophobic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho sits, but 'settling in' is not in his vocabulary. His right leg begins to bounce rhythmically, vibrating the entire table. He pulls a pen from his pocket and begins spinning it around his thumb with practiced ease.
main_dialogue.tone: Rhythmic and distracting.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: The derivative of a function represents the rate of change... are you even listening? Your pen is making a clicking sound every time it hits the table.
main_dialogue.tone: Strained patience; the sound of someone trying not to snap.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I'm listening! You said... rate of... something. Look, it’s just hard to focus when I feel like a librarian is going to jump out and tackle me for breathing too loud.
main_dialogue.tone: Defensive but playful, trying to deflect his lack of understanding.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Confused expression, tilting head to the side, hand ruffling his messy undercut hair.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [heavy sigh] If you spent half as much energy on calculus as you do on spinning that pen, we’d be done by now. Look at the graph. If 'x' approaches zero, what happens to the slope?
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted and clinical.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand on her chin, looking upward thoughtfully while holding her book under one arm.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: The slope... it... uh... it goes on vacation? Man, I don't know. My brain feels like it's being squeezed by a vice.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Shrug': Dispirited and genuinely lost.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Scold him for his lack of effort.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Kang Ji-ho! This is serious. I’m giving up my free time to help you, and you’re treating this like a joke. Put the pen down and FOCUS.
branching_dialogue.tone: Sharp and commanding.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa, okay, okay! Teacher Seo-yoon is in the building. Pen is down. See? Totally focused.
branching_dialogue.tone: Startled and slightly intimidated, but still trying to maintain his cool.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Try to use a basketball analogy.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [sigh] Fine. Think of the slope like the arc of your shot. If the angle is too steep, what happens to the ball's trajectory?
branching_dialogue.tone: Reluctant but helpful, simplifying her language.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: The arc? Oh! Well, it hits the backboard too hard. Wait... so the derivative is just the angle of the shot at a specific moment?
branching_dialogue.tone: Sudden realization; bright and energetic.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, sharp cat-like eyes with a playful glint, one eyebrow raised.

content.initial_location_description: A quiet, dusty corner of the high school library. Shafts of golden afternoon light pierce through tall, narrow windows, illuminating dust motes dancing over rows of ancient, leather-bound books. A heavy oak table is covered in neatly organized notebooks and a single, thick calculus textbook.
content.initial_bgm: low-fi academic ambient with a hint of ticking clock

scenes.title: The Full-Court Press Strategy
scenes.summary: Recognizing that traditional teaching isn't working, Seo-yoon changes her tactics. In a comedic, manhwa-style montage, she begins drawing basketball courts on the margins of Ji-ho's history notes. She explains the Napoleonic Wars using 'offensive transitions' and 'zone defense' metaphors. Ji-ho’s eyes finally light up as he starts to grasp the material. The scene features stylized visual humor, with 'chibi' versions of the duo appearing in his imagination to reenact historical battles as high-stakes basketball games. For the first time, they find a rhythm that works for both of them.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in the library is heavy with the scent of old paper and the palpable weight of Ji-ho's complete lack of interest in the 19th century.
main_dialogue.tone: Neutral, descriptive narration

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] Ji-ho, for the third time... Napoleon wasn't 'just camping' in the center. It was a strategic retreat to bait the coalition forces.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Academic Strain': Strained, slightly high-pitched, and words clipped with polite frustration.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: It sounds like a lot of walking just to get punched in the face, Seo-yoon. Why didn't he just go for the fast break?
main_dialogue.tone: Dull and uninterested, voice dropping in pitch toward the end of the sentence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [gasp] A fast break? Wait...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Moment of Realization': A sharp intake of breath followed by a sudden, intense focus.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon notices a sketch of a basketball court in the margins of Ji-ho's notebook. She grabs his pen with a sudden, predatory speed.
main_dialogue.tone: Intense, cinematic narration

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Give me that. Look. This isn't a battlefield, Ji-ho. This is the fourth quarter. Napoleon is the point guard.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Tactical Shift': Deep, rhythmic, and full of newfound bravado. Like a coach in a locker room.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: ...Napoleon is the point guard? Go on.
main_dialogue.tone: Intrigued and surprised, voice rising in pitch.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A stylized, manhwa-style background where a grassy 19th-century battlefield is overlaid with the glowing lines of a basketball court. Chibi versions of Napoleon and soldiers are wearing jerseys over their uniforms.

content.initial_location_description: A quiet, sun-drenched school library with tall wooden bookshelves and rows of study desks. In the foreground, a messy table is covered in history textbooks and open notebooks. Dust motes dance in the light.

scenes.title: From Books to Boards
scenes.summary: The duo moves to the gym as Ji-ho’s scheduled practice time begins. Seo-yoon sits on the bottom row of the bleachers, attempting to continue her own studies while Ji-ho warms up. The atmosphere shifts from the stuffy library to the energetic, echoing gym. Seo-yoon finds herself frequently distracted from her reading, watching Ji-ho’s athletic grace and the intense focus he puts into every shot. She begins to see a side of him that isn't the 'lazy student' she initially assumed him to be.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The quiet, dust-mote filled air of the library is replaced instantly by the sharp, rhythmic 'thwack' of a basketball hitting the hardwood.
main_dialogue.tone: Descriptive and transitional
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Gym doors swinging open, followed by a rhythmic basketball bounce

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Finally! I thought my lungs were going to shrivel up in that library. You can handle a little noise, right, Tutor-nim?
main_dialogue.tone: Playful and energized
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing tall, hands in pockets, signature arrogant smirk, varsity jacket slung over one shoulder.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] Noise is an understatement. It's... very cavernous in here. I'll just sit over there. Don't mind me.
main_dialogue.tone: Slightly overwhelmed but trying to remain composed
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon finds a spot on the lowest row of the bleachers, spreading her notes out like a small fortress of paper against the vastness of the gym.
main_dialogue.tone: Narrative

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (Alright, Chapter 4: Macroeconomics. If I can just tune out the squeaking of his sneakers, I can finish this summary...)
main_dialogue.tone: Determined internal monologue
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding an open book in both hands, eyes looking down in a calm reading pose.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A sudden, sharp *swish* draws her eyes upward. Ji-ho has already shed his jacket, and the change in his demeanor is startling.
main_dialogue.tone: Intriguing and observant

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.tone: Silent, focused breathing
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: He isn't lounging or yawning anymore. His movements are fluid, almost surgical. Every dribble is precise, every jump shot a display of calculated grace.
main_dialogue.tone: Admiring and descriptive

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (He's... different. In the classroom, he looks like he's constantly trying to escape his own skin. But here...)
main_dialogue.tone: Thoughtful and surprised
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho drives toward the hoop, his sneakers screeching against the floor, and dunks the ball with a force that makes the backboard vibrate.
main_dialogue.tone: Action-oriented

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Gasp] Oh!
main_dialogue.tone: Startled and impressed
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled, holding the book high to hide the lower half of her face, eyes wide with surprise.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: What's the matter, Seo-yoon? Is the 'lazy student' moving too fast for you to keep up?
main_dialogue.tone: Teasing but with a hint of genuine pride
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wiping sweat from his forehead with the back of his hand, breathing heavily, athletic and focused.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I didn't realize you took practice this seriously. You look... actually focused for once.
branching_dialogue.tone: Honest and slightly impressed
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand on her chin, looking upward thoughtfully while holding her book under one arm.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Heh. Don't sound so shocked. Even I have things I don't want to lose at.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Play it cool and refocus on the book.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: The backboard is just loud, that's all. If you have time to tease me, you have time to finish ten more free throws.
branching_dialogue.tone: Clinical and dismissive, hiding a blush
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Scary... You’re a slave driver, you know that? Fine, fine. Watch and learn.
branching_dialogue.tone: Amused and mock-exhausted
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

content.initial_location_description: A sprawling high school gymnasium with polished, honey-colored wooden floors that gleam under the bright LED rafters. Rows of blue retractable bleachers line the walls, and the distant sound of a clock buzzer echoes against the high ceiling. The air is cool but carries the faint, energetic scent of floor wax and athletic spirit.
content.initial_bgm: Upbeat, rhythmic lo-fi with an echoing reverb to simulate a large hall

scenes.title: The Stray Ball
scenes.summary: During a vigorous drill, a ball is deflected wildly toward the sidelines where Seo-yoon is sitting. Caught off guard while she was looking down at a page, she doesn't have time to react. The ball strikes her shoulder, knocking her off the bleacher bench. She falls to the floor, scraping her knee in the process. Ji-ho immediately stops his drill, ignoring the coach and his teammates, and sprints across the court with a look of genuine panic on his face.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Keep your eyes on the ball! Rotation! Now!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Commanding Bark': A sharp, authoritative projection designed to cut through the noise of the gym. Hard consonants and a resonant chest voice.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing the wooden pointer forward authoritatively, mouth open as if lecturing

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The gym is a whirlwind of movement, but for Min Seo-yoon, the world is contained within the ink of her novel.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and observational.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Internal] Almost... at the end of the chapter... just a few more pages...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Focused Murmur': Soft, internal, and rhythmic, reflecting a deep state of flow and quiet concentration.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding an open book in both hands, eyes looking down in a calm reading pose

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Hah! Not on my watch!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Athletic Exultation': Breathy, high-energy, and brimming with youthful confidence. Each word carries the physical weight of a jump.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wiping sweat from his forehead with the back of his hand, breathing heavily, athletic and focused

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho leaps for a spike, but the ball clips the top of the net at a jagged angle, ricocheting with violent force toward the sidelines.
main_dialogue.tone: Tense and sudden.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon! Look out!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Panic Spike': High-pitched, frantic, and sudden. The voice cracks slightly under the pressure of urgency.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deeply surprised, both hands on her cheeks, mouth in an 'O' shape

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Huh—?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Dazed Interruption': A short, breathy syllable that indicates a total lack of situational awareness.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The ball slams into Seo-yoon’s shoulder, the force knocking her backward off the bleacher bench. Her book skids across the floor as she lands hard on the gym tiles.
main_dialogue.tone: Dramatic and heavy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon!!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Visceral Shout': Raw, unpolished, and loud. The arrogance is gone, replaced by a sharp, jagged edge of genuine fear.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Kang Ji-ho! Get back in the—!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Ignored Authority': Sharp and annoyed, but trailing off as the teacher realizes the severity of the distraction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shocked expression, eyes wide behind glasses, grip loosening on the wooden pointer

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho doesn't even hear him. He clears the net in a single stride, sprinting across the court with a speed that makes the other students freeze in place.
main_dialogue.tone: Fast-paced and intense.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: O-ow... my knee...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Stifled Whimper': Thin, shaky, and strained. The voice is tight as she tries to hold back tears of shock.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Don't move! Are you okay? Where does it hurt? Dammit, answer me!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Frenzied Protector': Rapid-fire questioning, breathless and shaky. The volume is high, but the tone is desperate, not angry.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Accept his help to stand up.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I... I think I scraped it. Can you help me?
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Fragile Request': Small and hesitant, leaning into the vulnerability of the moment.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Easy. Put your weight on me. I've got you.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Low Reassurance': A sudden drop in volume to a deep, stabilizing hum. Protective and steady.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Try to wave him off and stand alone.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I'm fine, Ji-ho. It's just a scrape. Go back to your drill.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Stubborn Flutter': Trying to sound composed while the voice still trembles from the fall.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Shut up and stay still. You're bleeding, you idiot. You're not going anywhere alone.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Gruff Caretaker': Sharp and abrasive on the surface, but the underlying concern is painfully obvious.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Protective stance, stepping forward, arm extended out to the side, fierce protective gaze

content.initial_location_description: A high school gymnasium with polished wooden floors reflecting the bright overhead lights. The rhythmic squeaking of sneakers and the heavy thud of volleyballs echo against the high ceiling. On the sidelines, wooden bleachers are mostly empty.

scenes.title: Careful Hands
scenes.summary: Ji-ho reaches Seo-yoon and helps her sit up. He quickly retrieves a first aid kit from the equipment room. In a classic heart-fluttering manhwa moment, the 'camera' focuses on his gentle hands as he carefully cleans the small scrape on her knee with an antiseptic wipe. The physical proximity makes Seo-yoon’s heart race, and she notices the contrast between his rough, calloused 'athlete' hands and the tenderness of his touch. He blows softly on the wound to dull the sting, causing a flush to creep up Seo-yoon’s neck.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The echoing squeaks of sneakers on the far court fade into the background as Ji-ho kneels beside Seo-yoon on the polished floor.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and quiet.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Easy there. Don't try to stand up too fast. You took a pretty hard spill.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Protective Hero': A grounded, steady register with a hint of concern. Lowered pitch to create an intimate, private space.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] I'm fine, really... It was just a clumsy trip. I should have been looking where I was going.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Shy Protagonist': Soft and slightly breathy, with a rising inflection at the end to show uncertainty and embarrassment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Stay here. I'm getting the kit from the equipment room. Don't you dare move.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Arrogant but Caring': Commanding and firm, yet without any real bite. A playful authoritative edge.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A moment later, Ji-ho returns with a white plastic box. He settles onto his haunches, the distance between them shrinking significantly.
main_dialogue.tone: Observational and slightly romantic.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Give me your leg. I need to clean this before it gets worse.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Focused Caretaker': Soft and direct. The tone is stripped of its usual bravado, replaced by genuine gentleness.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon watches as his large, calloused hands—the hands of an athlete—handle the antiseptic wipe with surprising delicacy. The contrast is startling; the same hands that aggressively dribble a ball are now barely brushing her skin.
main_dialogue.tone: Descriptive and sensory-focused.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Sharp intake of breath] ...It's cold.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Startled React': A quick, high-pitched gasp followed by a soft, trembling murmur.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: blushing intensely and appearing shy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I know. It'll only sting for a second. Just look at me, okay?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Bright and inviting. You can hear the reassurance in the warmth of the tone.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: He leans down, his face inches from her knee. To her shock, he blows a soft, cool breath over the stinging scrape to dull the pain of the antiseptic.
main_dialogue.tone: Intimate and breathless.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Internal] My heart... why is it beating so loud? He's so close I can smell the faint scent of his laundry detergent and the citrus of his shampoo.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Dazed Romantic': Dreamy, low-volume internal monologue, heavy with realization.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pulling the oversized cardigan collar up to cover her mouth, looking embarrassed and flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Thank you, Ji-ho. You... you're actually really good at this.
branching_dialogue.tone: Grateful and sincere with a shy smile.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Don't get used to it. I don't play nurse for just anybody.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and smug, returning to his typical confident self.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Pull your leg away in embarrassment.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I can do the rest! Really! It's—it's too much!
branching_dialogue.tone: High-pitched and flustered panic.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa! Careful! You're going to knock the kit over. Fine, fine, take the bandage.
branching_dialogue.tone: Surprised and slightly amused.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

content.initial_location_description: The edge of a high school gymnasium. Polished amber wood floors reflecting the harsh overhead fluorescent lights. In the background, stacked blue gym mats and a mesh bin filled with basketballs are visible. The atmosphere is quiet and secluded compared to the main court area.

scenes.title: Unfiltered Truths
scenes.summary: As the gym empties out after practice, Ji-ho and Seo-yoon remain on the bleachers. The vulnerability of the accident leads to a deeper conversation. Ji-ho confesses the immense pressure he’s under; he isn't just playing for fun, but because a sports scholarship is his only way to afford university. In turn, Seo-yoon admits that her obsession with books and grades is a shield—she uses them to hide because she’s terrified of social interactions and being judged. They realize they both use their respective 'talents' as armor. The scene ends with a soft, understanding smile shared between them, the ice between them officially broken.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The squeak of sneakers and the rhythmic bounce of basketballs have finally faded, leaving behind a silence that feels almost heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Contemplative and quiet; a 'Weighted Silence' that signals a shift from the day's frantic energy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [sighs] Everyone's gone. It's weird when it's this quiet. Makes you think too much.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted honesty; the 'Post-Adrenaline Slump' where the bravado has been stripped away.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: distant hum of the school ventilation system

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Thinking isn't always a bad thing, Kang Ji-ho. Though... after today's accident, I suppose a little mental silence would be a relief.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and empathetic; the 'Library Whisper'—gentle but carrying weight.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: You probably think I'm just some arrogant jock who lives for the spotlight, right? That I do this because I love people screaming my name?
main_dialogue.tone: Self-deprecating and cynical; a bitter 'Half-Laugh' that doesn't reach his eyes.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I... I try not to make assumptions. But you do seem to thrive on the attention.
main_dialogue.tone: Cautious and observant; a 'Measured Response' that avoids direct confrontation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I thrive on it because I have to. I'm not playing for fun. If I don't get a sports scholarship, there's no university. No future. My family... we can't afford it otherwise.
main_dialogue.tone: Raw and vulnerable; 'The Brittle Truth'—the sound of someone admitting a secret they’ve kept hidden behind ego.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] A scholarship... so that's why you push yourself until you're literally breaking.
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless realization; 'The Soft Epiphany' where the pieces finally click together.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled, holding the book high to hide the lower half of her face, eyes wide with surprise.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Every missed shot feels like a door closing. It’s not talent, Seo-yoon. It’s armor. If I’m the 'star player,' nobody sees how terrified I am of failing.
main_dialogue.tone: Intense and focused; 'The Unmasked Gaze'—direct and painfully honest.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I think... I understand that better than I’d like to admit. These books? The straight A's? They aren't just because I like studying.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet confession; 'The Trembling Truth'—low-pitched and slightly shaky.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: They're a shield. If I'm busy reading, I don't have to talk to anyone. If I'm the 'top student,' I'm 'eccentric' instead of just... socially terrified. I use my grades to hide because I’m scared of being judged for who I actually am.
main_dialogue.tone: A 'Vulnerable Rush' of words; finally letting the pressure out after holding it in for years.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pulling the oversized cardigan collar up to cover her mouth, looking embarrassed and flustered.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: So I'm a jock because I'm poor, and you're a genius because you're shy. We're both just playing parts, aren't we?
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and gentle; a 'Knowing Smile'—the tone is bright and explicitly inviting common ground.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I guess we are. It’s exhausting, isn't it? Carrying all that weight alone.
branching_dialogue.tone: Relieved and soft; 'The Shared Burden'—a tone of deep connection.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Yeah. But maybe... sitting here right now... the weight feels a little lighter.
branching_dialogue.tone: Sincere and peaceful; 'The Quiet Comfort'—a relaxed, deep vocal quality.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Well, at least your 'armor' involves a cool jacket. Mine just involves papercuts and ink stains.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and light; a 'Gentle Tease'—the voice is airy and smiling.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand over her mouth, eyes closed, giggling softly with a light blush.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: [laughs] Hey, those ink stains are intimidating! Very scholarly. I'll stick to the sweat, thanks.
branching_dialogue.tone: A 'Hearty Laugh'; bright, resonant, and genuinely amused.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing heartily with eyes closed.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The camera zooms in tightly on the two protagonists. The background is blurred into a bokeh of orange and gold. The focus is entirely on the sincerity in their eyes as the distance between them—both physical and emotional—decreases.

content.initial_location_description: The high school gymnasium during golden hour. Long, orange light beams cut through the dust motes, reflecting off the polished wooden floors. The basketball hoops cast long, skeletal shadows. The silence is heavy and echoing, a stark contrast to the usual roar of the crowd.
content.initial_bgm: melancholic acoustic guitar with soft, lingering piano notes

scenes.title: The Final Deadline
scenes.summary: As the city lights of Seoul sparkle below, Seo-yoon and Ji-ho sit huddled over their laptops on the school rooftop. The air is cool, and the tension of the upcoming presentation hangs over them. They work in a comfortable rhythm, finalizing the last slides of their project. When the 'Save' icon finally stops spinning, they realize they’ve finished hours ahead of schedule. The silence of the school at night creates an intimate bubble around them, shifting the mood from academic stress to quiet companionship.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The only sounds are the distant hum of traffic and the rapid-fire tapping of keys on a keyboard.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and quiet.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Almost... there. I just need to reformat the references for the third slide and...
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and focused, muttering under her breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I've got the final animations synced. Just hit that button, Seo-yoon. Let’s put this thing to bed.
main_dialogue.tone: Intense but eager, leaning into the work.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Done! [click] It's uploading now... and... saved.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhaling a long-held breath, voice softening with relief.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Digital chime of a successful upload

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Hell yes! Presentation finished, and it’s not even midnight yet.
main_dialogue.tone: Triumphant and energetic, a sudden burst of joy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Victory pose, making a V-sign with his fingers, bright grin, designer sneakers visible.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: As the laptops go dim, the silence of the school rooftop becomes heavy, but no longer tense. The stress of the deadline evaporates, leaving something softer in its place.
main_dialogue.tone: Introspective and gentle.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Wait... the clock. Ji-ho, it's only 10:30 PM. We finished... three hours ahead of schedule?
main_dialogue.tone: Shocked, eyes widening as she looks at her screen.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Guess we're a better team than we thought. Or maybe you're just a slave-driver who makes me work faster.
main_dialogue.tone: Playful and teasing, with a hint of genuine admiration.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: The city looks beautiful from up here.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Look at all those lights. Everyone down there is still rushing around, but up here... it feels like time stopped.
branching_dialogue.tone: Dreamy and thoughtful, voice trailing off.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding the book behind her back, tilting her head with a gentle, questioning smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Yeah. It's rare to see it like this. Usually, I'm just looking at the road when I'm biking. It's... nice to just look.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and sincere, his gaze turning from the city to her.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: It's so quiet... I'm not used to this.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Is it always this quiet at night? I can almost hear my own heart beating.
branching_dialogue.tone: Vulnerable and slightly embarrassed.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pulling the oversized cardigan collar up to cover her mouth, looking embarrassed and flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Don't get too spooked. I'm right here. Besides, the silence is better than Mr. Han's lectures, right?
branching_dialogue.tone: Gentle teasing, trying to ease her nerves while leaning closer.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, sharp cat-like eyes with a playful glint, one eyebrow raised.

content.initial_location_description: Nighttime rooftop of a prestigious Korean high school. The scene is bathed in deep blues and purples, contrasted by the warm, glittering golden grid of Seoul's skyline in the distance. Two laptops are open on a low concrete ledge, their screens casting a soft white-blue glow on the characters. A cool breeze lightly rustles their hair.
content.initial_bgm: Lo-fi hip-hop with soft piano and ambient city wind noise

scenes.title: Lines and Shadows
scenes.summary: Seo-yoon compliments the professional quality of the illustrations they used in the presentation, assuming they were sourced online. Ji-ho hesitates before reaching into his bag and pulling out a worn, leather-bound sketchbook. He reveals that he is the artist behind every drawing. As Seo-yoon flips through the pages, she discovers not only the project work but dozens of candid, beautiful sketches of herself studying, laughing, and arguing during their late-night sessions. She is stunned by his secret talent and the obvious care he put into capturing her likeness.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I was looking over the final slides again, Ji-ho. I still can't get over those illustrations. Where did you even find them?
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and appreciative. The 'Vocal Smile' is evident as she admires the work.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: The style is so consistent... almost professional. Did you have to pay a high licensing fee for these? I should really reimburse you for half.
main_dialogue.tone: Thoughtful and sincere, with a hint of concern about the cost.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand on her chin, looking upward thoughtfully while holding her book under one arm.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Uh, no. There's no fee. I didn't get them from some stock image site, Seo-yoon.
main_dialogue.tone: A bit hesitant and bashful, lacking his usual bravado.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Then where? A freelancer? You shouldn't have spent your own money on our group project like that.
main_dialogue.tone: Inquisitive and slightly insistent.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted, scratching her cheek with one finger, looking confused and uncertain.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] Just... look. I've been meaning to show you this anyway.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet and vulnerable, exhaling as if letting go of a secret.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho reaches into his bag and pulls out a worn, leather-bound sketchbook. The edges are frayed, and the leather is darkened by years of use.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and observant.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Here. Everything from the slides is in here. Along with... some other stuff.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and hopeful, though his voice wavers slightly.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Offering the book toward the viewer with both hands, looking hopeful and slightly shy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: You... you drew these? Every single one of them?
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless with shock and dawning realization.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Yeah. I didn't want to say anything while we were working. I didn't want you to feel... pressured to use them just because I was the one drawing.
main_dialogue.tone: Earnest and gentle, eyes crinkling with a genuine warmth.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon takes the book, her fingers trembling slightly as she flips past the project sketches. But then, the subject matter changes.
main_dialogue.tone: Tense and expectant.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [gasps] Ji-ho... this is...
main_dialogue.tone: Faint and overwhelmed with emotion.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled, holding the book high to hide the lower half of her face, eyes wide with surprise.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The pages are filled with her. Seo-yoon hunched over a desk, Seo-yoon laughing at a joke she tried to hide, Seo-yoon pouting over a difficult math problem. Every sketch is rendered with incredible detail and obvious affection.
main_dialogue.tone: Romantic and descriptive.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator
