main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: You've been watching me this whole time? You caught the way I look when I'm tired... even the way I hold my glasses...
main_dialogue.tone: Vulnerable and deeply touched, her voice dropping to a whisper.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clutching her book tightly to her chest, blushing intensely and appearing shy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I, uh... you're a good subject! Very expressive! It's just... technical practice, I swear!
main_dialogue.tone: Completely panicked and embarrassed, his face turning a deep crimson.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely flustered, face beet red, trying to hide his face with his varsity jacket.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: They're more than practice, Ji-ho. They're beautiful. I didn't know you saw me this way... it's like seeing myself through your eyes.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and relieved, a genuine connection forming.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: I... I'm glad you don't think it's creepy. I just couldn't help it. Every time you'd focus on something, the light would hit you and I just had to draw.
branching_dialogue.tone: Sincere and deeply honest.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Tease him for being a 'secret fan.'

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: So, Kang Ji-ho is actually the president of my secret fan club? I should have known you were paying such close attention.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and teasing, trying to break the heavy tension.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding the book behind her back, tilting her head with a gentle, questioning smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Don't get cocky, Librarian! I just needed a model who didn't move much because they're always stuck in a book!
branching_dialogue.tone: Defensive but playful, returning to his usual banter though his blush remains.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

content.initial_location_description: A scenic high school rooftop during the golden hour. The sky is a gradient of deep orange and soft violet. A chain-link fence lines the edge, with the city's silhouette in the distance. The lighting is warm and cinematic, casting long shadows across the concrete floor.

scenes.title: More Than a Game
scenes.summary: Under the canopy of stars, the atmosphere becomes heavy with unspoken words. Ji-ho closes his sketchbook and looks out at the horizon. He admits that he used to see life like a video game—something to be optimized and won. However, he confesses to Seo-yoon that the time they spent together, even the moments of bickering over the project, has felt more rewarding and 'real' than any high score he’s ever achieved. He looks her in the eyes and tells her that he doesn't want the partnership to end just because the project is over.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air on the rooftop is chilly, but the silence between us feels even heavier. The city below hums, oblivious to the quiet tension up here.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and quiet; setting a reflective mood.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [thud] ...That’s the last of the sketches for the final presentation.
main_dialogue.tone: A heavy, final exhale. The sound of a chapter closing.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Thinking posture, hand on chin, eyes looking up and to the side with a pensive look.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: They look amazing, Ji-ho. We actually did it. I didn't think we'd finish the whole proposal by tonight.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and appreciative, with a hint of fatigue.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Yeah. We did.
main_dialogue.tone: Distracted and distant, as if his mind is elsewhere.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting his school uniform collar, looking into the distance with a cool, stoic expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: You know... I used to see everything as a series of mechanics. School, sports, even people.
main_dialogue.tone: Introspective and vulnerable; dropping the usual arrogant facade.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Life was just a game to be optimized. If I wasn't winning, or if I wasn't the best, it was just wasted XP. A waste of time.
main_dialogue.tone: Slightly bitter but honest self-reflection.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho...
main_dialogue.tone: A soft whisper of concern.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: But this project... the hours we spent arguing over color palettes and character arcs... it didn't feel like a grind.
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and nostalgic, even though the events just happened.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: It felt... real. More real than any high score I've ever hit. Being with you... it changed the math.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': You must hear the grin in the audio; bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I don't want the partnership to end just because the project is over, Seo-yoon. I don't want to go back to just 'optimizing' my life alone.
main_dialogue.tone: Steady and resolute, looking her directly in the eyes.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: I don't want it to end either.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I... I feel the same way. I was actually worried you'd be glad to finally be rid of my 'nagging'.
branching_dialogue.tone: Relieved and sweet, with a small emotional catch in her voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Hah! Your nagging is the only thing that keeps my ego in check. It's a vital game mechanic now.
branching_dialogue.tone: Teasing and joyful.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing heartily with eyes closed.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Is this your way of asking for a Round 2?

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: So... are you saying you're ready for a Round 2? Because I still have a lot of notes on your character designs.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and spirited, trying to hide her blushing face.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding the book behind her back, tilting her head with a gentle, questioning smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Bring it on, Seo-yoon. I'm not giving up my spot as your Player Two that easily.
branching_dialogue.tone: A cheeky, confident smirk.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

content.initial_location_description: A high-angle view of the school rooftop under a deep indigo night sky sprinkled with brilliant stars. The city lights of Seoul twinkle like a distant galaxy on the horizon. A cold breeze rustles the laundry hanging on nearby lines, and the silver moonlight casts long, dramatic shadows across the concrete floor.
content.initial_bgm: soft, pensive piano melody with a slight lo-fi beat

scenes.title: A New Sunrise
scenes.summary: The first hues of pink and gold begin to bleed into the night sky as dawn approaches. Seo-yoon meets Ji-ho's gaze, her own feelings finally surfacing. They stand close together at the rooftop railing, the morning wind ruffling their hair. In a classic romantic climax, Ji-ho leans in, closing the distance between them. The scene captures a 'will-they-won't-they' heartbeat of anticipation that culminates in a soft, meaningful kiss just as the sun breaks over the city, signaling the start of a new chapter in their lives beyond the classroom.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air on the rooftop is crisp, carrying the quiet stillness that only exists in the moments before the world wakes up.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and peaceful

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [softly] It's so quiet... I never imagined the school could feel this peaceful. Like we're the only two people left in the world.
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless and contemplative
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I used to come up here to get away from the noise. But today... I don't feel like hiding anymore.
main_dialogue.tone: Honest and vulnerable
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting his school uniform collar, looking into the distance with a cool, stoic expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho... after everything that happened with the club, and the exams... do you think things will really change for us?
main_dialogue.tone: Apprehensive but hopeful
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: They already have. I'm not the same person I was when we first met. You did that to me, Seo-yoon.
main_dialogue.tone: Deep and sincere
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: He steps closer, the gap between them narrowing until the only thing between them is the morning breeze.
main_dialogue.tone: Heightened tension

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I don't want to just be your 'project' or your classmate. I want to be the one standing next to you when the sun comes up every day.
main_dialogue.tone: Intense and romantic
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] Ji-ho...
main_dialogue.tone: Emotional and vulnerable
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon tilts her head up, her heart hammering against her ribs like a trapped bird.
branching_dialogue.tone: Dramatic and romantic

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Finally...
branching_dialogue.tone: A low, satisfied whisper
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The first ray of golden light breaks over the horizon, catching the dust motes in the air as their lips finally meet in a soft, certain kiss.
branching_dialogue.tone: Crescendo

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I'm not going anywhere. We'll face whatever comes next together.
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and loving
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: That's all I needed to hear.
branching_dialogue.tone: Relieved and tender
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Ji-ho doesn't wait for another word. He cups her cheek and leans down, sealing the promise with a kiss as the city below begins to glow with morning light.
branching_dialogue.tone: Warm and sweet

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The sun has finally crested the horizon, flooding the rooftop in brilliant gold and vibrant orange light. The long shadows are being chased away, and the characters are illuminated in a warm, ethereal glow.

content.initial_location_description: The rooftop of the high school under a bleeding predawn sky. Soft, painterly hues of indigo, violet, and pale gold stretch across the horizon. The metal railing is damp with dew, reflecting the first light. Manhwa style with high contrast between the cool shadows and the warm light of the approaching sun.
content.initial_bgm: A swell of emotional piano and slow-building cinematic strings.
